# 21 — Social Sharing and Healthy Competition

<context-hint>
Use for postcards, public share pages, referrals, battle motivation, leaderboards, streaks, achievements, and competitive loops.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as `bjt-growth-social`. Build or review one social/competition feature so it is privacy-safe, fair, and learning-first.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `.github/agents/bjt.growth-social.agent.md`.
2. Read `docs/spec/index.md`, `docs/spec/digests/growth_social_digest.md`, `docs/spec/compact/11_learning_effectiveness_experience.md`, `docs/spec/compact/06_learner_ui_modules.md`, and `docs/spec/compact/07_security_privacy.md`.
3. Inspect the target share/battle/referral/leaderboard flow.
4. Verify opt-in behavior, privacy-safe public data, OG metadata, anti-fake rules, and fairness.
5. Ensure progress/rank/share data is persisted and auditable where relevant.
6. Run/document relevant checks.
</instructions>

<avoid>
- Publicly exposing private learning history.
- Fake ranks, fake opponents, fake share stats.
- Pay-to-win or manipulative referral mechanics.
- Competition that interrupts focused study.
</avoid>
